description_long: This object is a large, industrial-style sewing machine mounted on a sturdy rectangular base. The machine features a long, horizontal metallic body with various mechanical components, including a needle assembly, thread guides, and tensioners. Two prominent vertical supports with clamps and adjustable arms are attached to the base, likely for holding fabric or guiding material. Several black cables and wires are visible, connecting different parts of the machine, and there are orange knobs and pulleys for adjustments and operation. The base is wide and flat, providing stability, and the overall construction appears robust, suitable for heavy-duty or specialized sewing tasks. The machine lacks decorative elements and is designed for functionality and precision in an urban workshop or industrial setting.
description: A robust, industrial sewing machine with a long metallic body, mounted on a wide base with adjustable supports, cables, and orange control knobs. Designed for heavy-duty sewing tasks in a workshop or industrial environment.
description_view_0: Front view showing the needle assembly, thread guides, and the alignment of the machine's main body with visible cables and clamps.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the machine, the horizontal body, and the arrangement of the supports and pulleys.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the machine, the attachment points for cables, and the structure of the base and supports.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the machine's length, the placement of the supports, and the cable routing along the body.
